items.name: Legion Crown of the Undead
items.description:
The ultimate symbol of authority within the Underworld. This crown, forged from obsidian and soul-glass, is granted only to the most loyal commanders of the Legion. With three skulls that harbor the spirits of the fallen and glowing runes of power, it radiates a chilling aura that demands respect.

"Long live the Dark Lord. Long live the Legion."
